checks.evidence: Funding history: $3.5M seed (Mar 2024), $22M Series A (Apr 2025), $76M Series B (Sep 2025, Lightspeed), then a $120M Series C led by Menlo Ventures announced 2026-06-24 (company press, PR Newswire, Becker's), total >$222M. Latest disclosed round is Series C, past Series B. The '$102M' in Oct 2025 coverage was cumulative (Series A + B), not a separate round.

checks.evidence: $40M Series B at a $265M valuation, co-led by The Westly Group and TCV with Sequoia and Menlo participation, announced Aug 2025 (Fortune, Built In SF, company blog), ~$59M total. Latest disclosed round is Series B. Squint is an AI+AR 'agentic manufacturing' intelligence platform.

Active 'Applied AI Engineer' role (Mid to Staff+, $200K-$270K), San Francisco, on-site - Squint expects employees at HQ 5 days/week (careers page; Built In SF). Role builds AI that turns video/images/documents/tribal knowledge into structured workflows for frontline manufacturing - applied AI. Active on company careers page.

Built In SF lists 'HQ: San Francisco, California' and Fortune calls Squint 'a San Francisco startup', but no primary source publishes a specific SF street address. Corporate data providers (CB Insights, OpenCorporates, Craft) list 1937 Johnston Avenue, San Jose, CA (South Bay). SF-city HQ is asserted but the specific SF street address is unconfirmed and conflicts with a San Jose registered address.

candidates.notes: Funding passes (Series B, Aug 2025) and there is an active SF on-site Applied AI Engineer role. Blocked on sf_address/geocode: SF is claimed as HQ (Built In SF, Fortune) but no specific SF street address could be confirmed, and corporate registries list a San Jose HQ (1937 Johnston Ave). Retry: confirm the current SF office street address (from the Applied AI Engineer posting body or a company primary source) and that SF - not San Jose - is the primary office, then geocode.
